task  
framing the task  
this module defines the scope and boundaries of the task. it outlines the main components of the system prompt and clarifies the objectives and constraints that must be followed.  

reasoning process  
this module focuses on the logical steps and reasoning mechanisms that will be used to solve the task. it includes the methods and algorithms that will be applied to achieve the desired outcome.  

formatting and output  
this module specifies the format in which the final output must be presented. it includes details about the structure, content, and style of the response.  

error prevention and validation  
this module ensures that the system is designed to handle potential errors and validate the output against the original prompt's requirements.
